name: RBZ Cybersecurity Assessment
description: Assessment aligned to RBZ cybersecurity and resilience expectations

sections.name: Governance and Board Oversight
sections.description: Governance and Board Oversight controls and practices.

questions.text: Has the board approved a cybersecurity policy and reviewed it in the last 12 months?

guidance.title: Has the board approved a cybersecurity policy and reviewed it in the last 12 months?
guidance.risk: If this is not in place, control reliability and compliance evidence may be weak.
actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.

questions.text: Does management submit quarterly cyber risk reports to the board risk committee?

guidance.title: Does management submit quarterly cyber risk reports to the board risk committee?
guidance.risk: If this is not in place, control reliability and compliance evidence may be weak.
actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.

questions.text: Are cyber roles and accountabilities formally assigned across IT, risk, and operations?

actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.

questions.text: Is there an approved cyber budget linked to key risk treatment plans?

actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.
